name: John Cannon
bio: Professor in the School of Mathematics and Statistics at the University of Sydney.

name: John Voight
bio:
Research Interests:

 Arithmetic algebraic geometry: modular curves, Shimura varieties, moduli spaces, elliptic curves, modular and automorphic forms, zeta functions of varieties over finite fields, computational and algorithmic aspects
 Number theory: algebraic number theory, quaternion algebras, quadratic forms, finite-dimensional algebras, elementary number theory, cryptography, coding theory

name: Allan Steel
bio: I am a developer of the Magma Computer Algebra System.

name: Stephan Elsenhans
bio: I am a Professor for Computer Algebra at the University of Würzburg (Germany) and a member of the computational algebra group at the University of Sydney.

name: Don Taylor
bio: I am a member of the Algebra Research Group. Research interests include computations with groups, combinatorics and representation theory, particularly permutation groups and associated 'geometric' structures.

name: Bill Unger
bio: I am a member of the Computational Algebra Research Group. My research interests include algorithms for (finite) group computations, particularly in permutation groups. I am interested in using such algorithms to help out research in other areas of mathematics. These interests extend to algorithms in Representation Theory and Combinatorics.

name: Nicole Sutherland
bio: Computing in Mathematics, Natural Science, Engineering and Medicine Number Theory

name: Rhys J. Evans
bio: G’day! I am a Magma research fellow working in the Computational algebra group at the University of Sydney, School of Mathematics and Statistics. My research interests include algebraic graph theory, combinatorics, finite geometry, and related computational aspects.

name: Reymond Akpanya
bio: I am a Postdoctoral Research Associate in the School of Mathematics and Statistics at the University of Sydney, working with Prof. John Voight. Previously I completed my PhD at RWTH Aachen University under the supervision of Prof. Dr. Alice C. Niemeyer and Prof. Dr. Wilhelm Plesken.

name: Eran Assaf
bio: At the moment, I am a Research Scientist at MIT, and a Magma developer.

name: Geoff Bailey
bio: Member of the Computational Algebra Research Group.

name: Edgar Costa
bio:
I am a Research Scientist in the Mathematics Department at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology.
 My research focuses on arithmetic geometry, arithmetic statistics, and number theory, with an emphasis on developing effective computational methods.

name: Andrew Sutherland
bio: I am a Senior Research Scientist in the mathematics department at MIT, focused on computational number theory and arithmetic geometry.

name: Lewis Combes
bio: I am a Postdoctoral Fellow in Computation and Number Theory at the University of Sydney, working with John Voight and Geordie Williamson. Before that, I was a PhD student at the University of Sheffield, under the supervision of Haluk Şengün.

name: Blair Butler
bio:
PhD Student
School of Mathematics and Statistics
Carslaw Building (F07)
University of Sydney NSW 2006
Supervisor: J Voight
Auxiliary supervisor: K Coulembier
